HED.scrambled_car: (Duration/300 ms, (Sensory-event, Experimental-stimulus, Visual-presentation, (Disordered, Image, Car), (Gray-color, Background-view)))
HED.scrambled_face: (Duration/300 ms, (Sensory-event, Experimental-stimulus, Visual-presentation, (Disordered, Image, Face), (Gray-color, Background-view)))

Levels.face: Stimulus - photograph of a human face (hair, background, and clothing cropped); one of 40 exemplars; presented at center of screen on gray background for 300 ms, followed by interstimulus image for 1100-1300 ms; correct response: 'object' button
Levels.car: Stimulus - photograph of a car (background cropped); one of 40 exemplars; presented at center of screen on gray background for 300 ms, followed by interstimulus image for 1100-1300 ms; correct response: 'object' button
Levels.scrambled_face: Stimulus - phase-scrambled version of a face image; one of 40 exemplars; presented at center of screen on gray background for 300 ms, followed by interstimulus image for 1100-1300 ms; correct response: 'texture' button
Levels.scrambled_car: Stimulus - phase-scrambled version of a car image; one of 40 exemplars; presented at center of screen on gray background for 300 ms, followed by interstimulus image for 1100-1300 ms; correct response: 'texture' button
Levels.correct_response: Response - correct buttonpress ('object' for face or car; 'texture' for scrambled face or scrambled car)
